{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Visirian military
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Visirian military]] is a force that could be affected by a weapons demonstration.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c33">''The Knight'', chapter 33</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
